step_one.title: What would you like to create?
step_one.footer_note: You can setup the other program later. Both campaigns can be managed from your dashboard at any time.

program_referral.title: Customer Referral
program_referral.description: Let your existing customers invite friends
features: Friends get a discount as a reward
The referrer earns discounts as a commission

program_affiliate.title: Affiliate Campaign
program_affiliate.description: Work with partners, influencers, or publishers
features: They promote your store with links/codes
Earn commission for every sale they bring
Best for scaling with professional promoters

step_two_referral.title: Referral program
step_two_referral.reward_description: A referral is complete when the referred person uses the reward given by the referrer to make a purchase
step_two_referral.branding_description: This will be the main color for referral popup and referral page

step_two_affiliate.title: Affiliate program
step_two_affiliate.example_percentage: For example, an order with a total sales amount of $1000, the affiliate will earn a {{percent}}% commission, which is ${{amount}}
step_two_affiliate.example_per_order: For example, regardless of how much the sales amount of an order is, the affiliate's commission is always {{value}}{{symbol}} per order
step_two_affiliate.example_per_item: For example, regardless of how many items of an order is, the affiliate's commission is always {{value}}{{symbol}} per item

step_two_portal.title: Affiliate Program
step_two_portal.portal_description: The Affiliate Portal provides affiliates with tools to access links, monitor performance, and manage payouts
step_two_portal.login_hint: Login with a test account now to see how portal looks like

step_three.title: Ready to launch
step_three.intro: The last step: ready to launch your program by enable the app embedded block

step_four.title: There're more to explore
step_four.cross_sell_referral: In addition to the Referral Program, we also offer an Affiliate Program that can benefit your business. Please check it out under the Affiliate tab, and feel free to let us know if you need any assistance! 😊
step_four.cross_sell_affiliate: In addition to the Affiliate Program, we also offer an Referral Program that can benefit your business. Please check it out under the Referral tab, and feel free to let us know if you need any assistance! 😊
